message:
feat: Implement real functionality for runtime modules

- _collections.zig: Efficient O(n) deque.rotate() using three-reversal algorithm
- _ctypes.zig: Real pythonapi.get() using dlsym(RTLD_DEFAULT) on POSIX,
  GetProcAddress on Windows for symbol lookup in current process
- _operator.zig: Update attrgetter/methodcaller docs (already working)
- _pickle.zig: Implement TUPLE, LIST, DICT, APPEND, SETITEM, POP, DUP,
  MEMOIZE, FRAME opcodes; return UnknownOpcode error instead of silently
  skipping unknown opcodes
